description: Reusable definitions for fund.at funding metadata. Designed for use by fund.at.funding.manifest and any future record types or third-party integrations. Field names and semantics are aligned with the funding.json open standard (fundingjson.org) where applicable.

channel.description: A single payment channel where contributions can be made. Maps to a funding.json channel entry.

channelId.description: Slug identifier for this channel, unique within the manifest (e.g. 'github-sponsors', 'open-collective'). Maps to funding.json channel.guid.

channelType.description: Channel category. Maps to funding.json channel.type.

uri.description: The payment URL for this channel (e.g. https://github.com/sponsors/you). Optional for channels without a public URL (e.g. bank transfers). Maps to funding.json channel.address.

plan.description: A funding plan or tier with a suggested amount. Maps to a funding.json plan entry.

planId.description: Slug identifier for this plan, unique within the manifest. Maps to funding.json plan.guid.

status.description: Whether this plan is currently accepting contributions. Maps to funding.json plan.status.

description.description: What this plan covers or how the funds are used.

amount.description: Suggested amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD). Use 0 for 'any amount'. Maps to funding.json plan.amount (converted from whole units).

frequency.description: How often the plan is billed. Maps to funding.json plan.frequency.

channels.description: Channel IDs where this plan can be fulfilled. If omitted, all channels apply. Maps to funding.json plan.channels.

channelRef.description: A reference to a channel by its ID.

channelId.description: The channelId of the referenced channel.
